hooks.command: file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.py$'; then echo "Running ruff on $file..."; ruff check --fix --quiet "$file" 2>/dev/null; ruff format --quiet "$file" 2>/dev/null; echo "Ruff check and format complete."; fi

cmd="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'migrate\b' && ! echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(showmigrations|makemigrations|--plan|--check|sqlmigrate|--fake)'; then echo 'WARNING: About to run migrations. Verify migration files have been reviewed. Use --plan to preview first.'; fi; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'flush\b|reset_db'; then echo 'DANGER: This will destroy all data in the database!'; exit 1; fi
